{{CargoRelic
|name=Goldfish Specimen
|class_id=20445
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This lifelike specimen is the preserved carcass of a goldfish from the species war. It's an incidental result of the snails' research on Goldfish physiology. It's not just an accurate replica of the goldfish exterior, but a graphic presentation of the internal organs of goldfish, which helps snails understand goldfish better and develop better strategies against goldfish!
|fame=31
|art=14
|fth=20
|civ=13
|tech=11
|ss1=Against Goldfish, Troop Casualty -1%
|ss2=Against Goldfish, Troop Casualty -2%
|ss3=Against Goldfish, Troop Casualty -3%
|ss4=Against Goldfish, Troop Casualty -3%
|ss7=Against Goldfish, Troop Casualty -3%<br> (Awakened)
}}
